interface.shortDescription: Personal Codex plugins and skills for review, scaffolding, UI testing, and agent workflows
interface.longDescription: AI Tools is Shravan Sunder's personal Codex marketplace for reusable agent workflows, including project scaffolding, native UI testing, and development workflows with research swarms, spec creation swarms, spec handoffs, plan creation swarms, subordinate agent management, mental-model reconvergence, docs maintenance, implementation test-writing rigor, bounded review lanes, PR wrap-up, operations security review routing, and TUI presentation guidance.
